content.text:
The test PASSED! Let me analyze: insurance sum for sword (1000) + 3 runes (250 × 3 = 750) = 1750. Cap = 2 × 1750 = 3500. The current `sumInsuranceValues` simply sums raw insurance values without applying block discounts. So this test passes immediately.

This is an unexpected pass. The test confirms existing behavior. Since the function already correctly handles this case (insurance values don't get block discount applied), the test passes without changes.
